title: Luxshiny Pumpkin Paper Plates 30pcs Halloween Paper Plates 7 Inch Waterproof Food Holder for Autumn Decor and Snacks
features: Festive Pumpkin Design: These pumpkin paper trays feature a creative and cute pumpkin shape perfect for adding a seasonal touch to your halloween party table, making them a standout decoration for autumn gatherings

Multi-purpose use: the pumpkin paper plate measures 7.07X6.88X0.79 inches/18.00X17.50X2.00 cm. Not only a practical tableware, but also a great party decoration. Matching with themed napkins, tablecloths and cups can further enhance the party atmosphere and make your party more .

Beautiful design: Halloween paper plates are made of chic colours and creative pumpkin patterns, combined with premium-quality paper material, which is both beautiful and durable. Each paper plate is carefully crafted to show elegance and charming visual effect.

Convenience and hassle-less: Halloween dinnerware is reusable and easy to store, especially for outdoor picnics or large parties. Meanwhile, its lightweight material makes carrying and storing a breeze.

Safe and Healthy: all the materials of the appetiser plates meet safety standards, ensuring the health and safety of you and your family and friends in the process of using them. Both children and adults can enjoy their food with peace of mind.
